author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: Fix server side rendering example (algolia/react-instantsearch#575)
body:
* chore(server-side-rendering): revert babel to 6.26.0 because the build fail

* chore(server-side-rendering): remove all useless dependency related to styling

* fix(server-side-rendering): update render to hydrate in React 16

* chore: ignore build folder

* feat(examples): add build command when missing

* feat(test:recipes): build the example before test
